---
title: 'Dream'
date: '2014-11-18T12:11:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '479942509449433746'
blogger_filename: '/2014/11/dream.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'kairos'
  - 'dream'
---

<p dir=ltr>Lots of people sleeping over same bed. Flavia was there. We'd rented movies and watched all but one. Kronos. Mom was there. I was changing underwear and naked, trying to put a sock on instead of underwear and it wasn't working. I've gone to another room trying to work on a computer and its not working and people keep coming in, I kick everyone out. Flavia asked me through the door if I'd watched kronos, she said its known to cause anger in people. I said no, and mom said to Flavia "I'm always telling him..." And I screamed in a violent anger " Mom!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Get in here now!" I started to confront her, "You always..." </p>
<p dir=ltr>Woke up startled...</p>
